CustomField.formula: IF(BEGINS(RecordType.DeveloperName, 'CONTAINER'), CONTAINER_Unit_Base_Price_Sales__c + CONTAINER_Standard_Option_Sales__c + CONTAINER_Special_Options_Sales__c + CONTAINER_Extended_Warranty_Sales__c + CONTAINER_Special_Requirement_Sales__c + CONTAINER_Total_Contract_Obligation__c + CONTAINER_Total_Extended_AppliedSales__c + CONTAINER_Total_Spare_Parts__c + CONTAINER_Total_ORBCOMM_AppliedCost__c, SBQQ__NetAmount__c)
CustomField.label: List Price
